ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who leads the project */,
  "version_control_system" TEXT /* Version control system used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the release belongs to */,
  "release_number" INTEGER /* Release number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "release_length" INTEGER /* Length of the release in days */,
  "weighted_release_length" REAL /* Weighted length of the release */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Current status of the release */,
  "release_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who leads the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_release_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path of the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Total lines of code (LOC) */,
  "loc_touched" INTEGER /* LOC touched in the file */,
  "number_of_revisions" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the file */,
  "fix_count" INTEGER /* Number of fixes made to the file */,
  "authors" INTEGER /* Number of authors who have contributed to the file */,
  "loc_added" INTEGER /* Total LOC added to the file */,
  "max_loc_added" INTEGER /* Maximum LOC added in a single revision */,
  "average_loc_added" REAL /* Average LOC added per revision */,
  "churn" INTEGER /* Total churn in the file */,
  "max_churn" INTEGER /* Maximum churn in a single revision */,
  "average_churn" REAL /* Average churn per revision */,
  "change_set_size" INTEGER /* Total change set size for the file */,
  "max_change_set_size" INTEGER /* Maximum change set size for the file */,
  "average_change_set_size" REAL /* Average change set size per revision */,
  "actual" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is active (True) or archived (False) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "file_language" TEXT /* Programming language of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  "file_complexity" INTEGER /* Metric indicating the complexity of the file */,
  "file_quality_score" REAL /* Composite score reflecting the overall quality of the file */,
  "file_last_commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the last commit that modified the file */,
  "file_last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit that modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_authors" (
  "file_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file-author association */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file-author association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file-author association */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the file's changes contributed by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_authors_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
